💡 Tips for Learning French Numbers

+
    +
  • Numbers 1-16 are unique and must be memorized
    • +
  • 17-19 follow the pattern "dix" + number (ten + number)
    • +
  • 70 = sixty-ten (soixante-dix), 80 = four-twenties (quatre-vingts)
    • +
  • 90 = four-twenty-ten (quatre-vingt-dix)
    • +
